'''lowayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jpegged|jpegged]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jpegged|jpegged]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lowayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lowayithi|lowayithi]] || [[word:lowayiji|lowayiji]] || [[word:lowayishi|lowayishi]] || [[word:lowayiki|lowayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lowayuthuthu|lowayuthuthu]] || [[word:lowayujuju|lowayujuju]] || [[word:lowayushushu|lowayushushu]] || [[word:lowayukuku|lowayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lowayuthu|lowayuthu]] || [[word:lowayuju|lowayuju]] || [[word:lowayushu|lowayushu]] || [[word:lowayuku|lowayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lowayufthuf|lowayufthuf]] || [[word:lowayufjuf|lowayufjuf]] || [[word:lowayufshuf|lowayufshuf]] || [[word:lowayufkuf|lowayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lowayethe|lowayethe]] || [[word:lowayeje|lowayeje]] || [[word:lowayeshe|lowayeshe]] || [[word:lowayeke|lowayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lowayothotho|lowayothotho]] || [[word:lowayojojo|lowayojojo]] || [[word:lowayoshosho|lowayoshosho]] || [[word:lowayokoko|lowayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lowayotho|lowayotho]] || [[word:lowayojo|lowayojo]] || [[word:lowayosho|lowayosho]] || [[word:lowayoko|lowayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lowayofthof|lowayofthof]] || [[word:lowayofjof|lowayofjof]] || [[word:lowayofshof|lowayofshof]] || [[word:lowayofkof|lowayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfthĂŻf|lowayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfjĂŻf|lowayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfshĂŻf|lowayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfkĂŻf|lowayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lowayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lowayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lowayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lowayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfthĂŻf|lowayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfjĂŻf|lowayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfshĂŻf|lowayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfkĂŻf|lowayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfthĂŻf|lowayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfjĂŻf|lowayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfshĂŻf|lowayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lowayĂŻfkĂŻf|lowayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lowayĂŠthĂŠ|lowayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lowayĂŠjĂŠ|lowayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lowayĂŠshĂŠ|lowayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lowayĂŠkĂŠ|lowayĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lowayathatha|lowayathatha]] || [[word:lowayajaja|lowayajaja]] || [[word:lowayashasha|lowayashasha]] || [[word:lowayakaka|lowayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lowayatha|lowayatha]] || [[word:lowayaja|lowayaja]] || [[word:lowayasha|lowayasha]] || [[word:lowayaka|lowayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lowayafthaf|lowayafthaf]] || [[word:lowayafjaf|lowayafjaf]] || [[word:lowayafshaf|lowayafshaf]] || [[word:lowayafkaf|lowayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lowayasha|lowayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lowayshĂ«sha|lowayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lowayrosha|lowayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lowaymusha|lowaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lowayasha|lowayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golowaynkshĂ«sha|golowaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golowaynkrosha|golowaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golowaynkmusha|golowaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golowaynkyasha|golowaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lowawayasha|lowawayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lowawayshĂ«sha|lowawayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lowawayrosha|lowawayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lowawaymusha|lowawaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lowawayasha|lowawayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golowawaynkshĂ«sha|golowawaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golowawaynkrosha|golowawaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golowawaynkmusha|golowawaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golowawaynkyasha|golowawaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lewĂŠyasha|lewĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lewĂŠyshĂ«sha|lewĂŠyshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lewĂŠyrosha|lewĂŠyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lewĂŠymusha|lewĂŠymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lewĂŠyasha|lewĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golewĂŠynkshĂ«sha|golewĂŠynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golewĂŠynkrosha|golewĂŠynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golewĂŠynkmusha|golewĂŠynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golewĂŠynkyasha|golewĂŠynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lowfayasha|lowfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lowfayshĂ«sha|lowfayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lowfayrosha|lowfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lowfaymusha|lowfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lowfayasha|lowfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golowfaynkshĂ«sha|golowfaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golowfaynkrosha|golowfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golowfaynkmusha|golowfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golowfaynkyasha|golowfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
